---
title: Meet the Programme Staff
title-block-banner: resources/banner.png
include-back-link: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width='30%'}

:::{.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
# Dr Daniel Chalk
<br/>
{{< include staff/main_staff_profiles/dc.qmd >}}
:::

:::

::: {.column width='5%'}

:::

::: {.column width='30%'}

:::{.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
# Sammi Rosser
<br/>
{{< include staff/main_staff_profiles/sr.qmd >}}
:::

:::

::: {.column width='5%'}

:::


::: {.column width='30%'}

:::{.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
# Jemma Phillips
<br/>
{{< include staff/main_staff_profiles/jp.qmd >}}
:::

:::

::::
